title: Gnome AI Assistant Adds Image Generation Support
abstract: Gnome AI Assistant Adds Image Generation Support handles image generation, video creation and 3D modeling from text descriptions. Built for creators who want results without the software learning c...
abstract_zh: 设计狗的梦中情工。Gnome AI Assistant Adds Image Generation Support 会画画、会做视频、会建模，关键是你只需要会敲字。什么PS、AE、Blender，不存在的。
